Container.Name: TorrentBridge
Container.Overview: TorrentBridge automates two-stage torrent seeding. Downloads complete fast on Unraid, then data is migrated to a Raspberry Pi (or any remote host) for long-term seeding. Once installed, open the Web UI to complete setup using the built-in Setup Guide. Deletes from the downloader only after the seeder confirms 100% data integrity.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the TorrentBridge web interface. Open this in your browser after starting the container.

Config.Name: Config & Data
Config.Description: Stores all settings, SSH keys, and logs. This folder persists your configuration across container updates.

Config.Name: Downloader BT_backup Folder
Config.Description: Mount your qBittorrent appdata BT_backup folder here (read-only). TorrentBridge reads .torrent files from this location to re-add them on the seeder. Common locations: /mnt/user/appdata/qbittorrent/data/BT_backup or /mnt/cache/appdata/binhex-qbittorrentvpn/qBittorrent/data/BT_backup

Config.Name: Downloads Folder
Config.Description: Mount your Unraid downloads folder here. TorrentBridge reads completed files from this path to transfer them to the seeder. Use the same path your qBittorrent container uses for downloads (e.g. /mnt/user/downloads or /mnt/user/data/torrents).
